title: centaurea deflexa
intro: Centaurea deflexa, also known as knapweed or Centaurea, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centaurea deflexa include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of salves or creams to treat skin conditions and wounds.
